title: kubeadm Configuration (v1beta3) — JoinConfiguration
text:
JoinConfiguration contains elements describing a particular node.
Field
Description
apiVersion
string
kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta3
kind
string
JoinConfiguration
nodeRegistration
NodeRegistrationOptions
nodeRegistration
holds fields that relate to registering the new
control-plane node to the cluster.
caCertPath
string
caCertPath
is the path to the SSL certificate authority used to secure
communications between a node and the control-plane.
Defaults to "/etc/kubernetes/pki/ca.crt".
discovery
[Required]
Discovery
discovery
specifies the options for the kubelet to use during the TLS
bootstrap process.
controlPlane
JoinControlPlane
controlPlane
defines the additional control plane instance to be deployed
on the joining node. If nil, no additional control plane instance will be deployed.
skipPhases
[]string
skipPhases
is a list of phases to skip during command execution.
The list of phases can be obtained with the
kubeadm join --help
command.
The flag
--skip-phases
takes precedence over this field.
patches
Patches
patches
contains options related to applying patches to components deployed
by kubeadm during
kubeadm join
.
nodeRegistration
holds fields that relate to registering the new
control-plane node to the cluster.

is the path to the SSL certificate authority used to secure
communications between a node and the control-plane.
Defaults to "/etc/kubernetes/pki/ca.crt".

on the joining node. If nil, no additional control plane instance will be deployed.

The list of phases can be obtained with the

command.
The flag

patches
contains options related to applying patches to components deployed
by kubeadm during

.
